description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

🔄 Content updated (Published: June 25, 2026)

Typhoons No. 7 and No. 8

Saitama Prefecture is expected to be affected by Typhoons No. 7 and No. 8, along with a weather front. On Saturday, June 27, very heavy rain with thunder and heavy rain are expected in some areas, bringing rough weather and rainfall at warning level.

Be on high alert for landslides. Watch for flooding in low-lying areas, rising river levels, and potential flooding. Also pay attention to lightning and strong sudden winds.

Preparation steps:

• Prepare flashlights, batteries, and portable radios
• Charge mobile phones
• Secure drinking water and supplies
• Check the area around your house
• Move items that could be blown away indoors, etc.

Typhoon track and intensity may change.

Continuously check the latest weather information.

Japan Meteorological Agency: Hanno City disaster prevention information (external site)

Hanno City Landslide Hazard Map

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/emergency/13758.html
